title: Kernel Methods, and Why DL Cares
tagline: From SVM kernels to the Neural Tangent Kernel — the through-line that connects classical ML to deep nets
summary: Click points onto a 2-D plane; pick RBF / polynomial / Laplacian; watch a kernel SVM's decision boundary change with the kernel and its hyperparameters. Then meet the Neural Tangent Kernel — the kernel that an infinitely wide neural net is, in the linearised limit. Then deep kernel learning, the practical hybrid.
highlights: Live click-to-add classification with RBF / polynomial / Laplacian / linear kernels.
Bandwidth and degree sliders so you can feel the kernel's smoothness knob.
NTK panel: a 1-hidden-layer NN with width →∞ behaves as a kernel regressor — visualised side-by-side with an actual finite-width net.
Where deep kernel learning sits and where it shines (small-data calibrated regression).
